data.name: ปวรดา วีรวรรณ

data.biography: "Pow" Pawarada Viravan is a Thai actress under The One Enterprise (เดอะ วัน เอ็นเตอร์ไพรส์). Her father is Channel One31 CEO Boy Takonkiet Viravan and she's the sister of actress Prang Prangsinee Viravan. She studied at Chulalongkorn University's Faculty of Communication Arts.
data.name: Pawarada Viravan
